title: Greenova Pty Ltd — Public safety
investigation_objective: Greenova Pty Ltd pleaded guilty in the Seymour Magistrates' Court to three charges under Victoria's Electricity Safety Act 1998 over non-compliant battery energy storage system installations at five Victorian properties between December 2023 and July 2024, including a property at Toolamba where an incorrectly installed battery overcharged and ignited, prompting a Country Fire Authority callout. The company was fined $9,000.
scope: Pleaded guilty to three electrical safety offences over non-compliant battery installations; One installation caused a battery to overcharge and ignite, requiring a fire brigade callout; Fined $9,000 by the court
